title: MaceEffect
description: Adds epic visual effects, custom particles, and cinematic slow-motion to your Mace kills!
body:
# 🔨 MaceEffect

**MaceEffect** is a cinematic visual enhancement mod that turns every Mace strike into an epic event. Designed for players who want their specialized combat to feel as powerful as it looks.

---

## ⌨️ Accessing the Menu
You can customize all settings directly in-game. 
**Press the [ J ] key** to open the Configuration Menu at any time!

---

## ✨ Features

### 🎬 Cinematic Slow-Motion (MLG Mode)
Experience your victories in style. When you land a killing blow on a player, the game briefly enters a cinematic slow-motion state, giving you that "MLG highlight" feel.

### 🎇 Custom Particle Effects
Choose from unique, high-quality particle systems to celebrate your impact:
*   ⭐ **Starfall:** Explode with vibrant, rotating stars upon impact.
*   ❄️ **Snowball:** Create a flurry of snow and frost particles.
*   💥 **Classic Explosion:** Enhanced vanilla-style fire and smoke.
*   🎲 **Random Mode:** Keep it fresh by cycling through all effects automatically.

### ⚙️ Full Control & Customization
Access the **In-Game Menu (Key: J)** to tailor the experience:
*   **Toggle Kill Effects:** Enable or disable visual effects on entity death.
*   **Mob Support:** Choose if effects should trigger only for players or for all mobs.
*   **Audio Tweaks:** Toggle custom sound effects and adjust the volume.
*   **Slow-Mo Toggle:** Turn the cinematic time-warp on or off.

---

## 🛠 Project Status: Full Recode
The mod has been completely rewritten from the ground up to ensure:
*   **Zero Performance Impact:** Optimized client-side logic.
*   **1.21 Compatibility:** Built for the latest Fabric versions.
*   **Bug-Free Experience:** Fixed legacy crashes and particle transparency issues.

---

## 🌍 Language Support
*   🇺🇸 English (`en_us`)
*   🇷🇺 Russian (`ru_ru`)
*   🇩🇪 German (`de_de`)

---

### 🚀 Requirements
*   **Fabric API**

*Crafted with 💖 for the Minecraft combat community.*
